title: St Benedict's Chapel, Sumvitg

You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=St_Benedict%27s_Chapel,_Sumvitg&action=edit).

([Romansh](/wiki/Romansh_language "Romansh language"): *Caplutta Sogn Benedetg*; [German](/wiki/German_language "German language"): *Kapelle des Heiligen Benedikt*) is a [Roman Catholic](/wiki/Roman_Catholicism "Roman Catholicism") church located in [Sumvitg](/wiki/Sumvitg "Sumvitg"), [Surselva Region](/wiki/Surselva_Region "Surselva Region"), [canton](/wiki/Cantons_of_Switzerland "Cantons of Switzerland") of [Graubünden](/wiki/Graub%C3%BCnden "Graubünden"), [Switzerland](/wiki/Switzerland "Switzerland").

["Kapelle Sogn Benedetg"](http://www.baukultur.gr.ch/de_DE/address/kapelle_sogn_benedetg.22983). *Graubünden – Baukultur | Bauwerke* (in German). Kantonsbibliothek Graubünden. Retrieved 17 February 2022.

[Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [46°44′05″N 8°56′23″E﻿ / ﻿46.73478°N 8.93967°E﻿ / 46.73478; 8.93967](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=St_Benedict%27s_Chapel,_Sumvitg&params=46.73478_N_8.93967_E_type:landmark_globe:earth_region:CH)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/52/Sogn_Benedetg1.jpg/250px-Sogn_Benedetg1.jpg)](/wiki/File:Sogn_Benedetg1.jpg)

St Benedict's Chapel in Sumvitg.

The **Chapel of Saint Benedict** ([Romansh](/wiki/Romansh_language "Romansh language"): *Caplutta Sogn Benedetg*; [German](/wiki/German_language "German language"): *Kapelle des Heiligen Benedikt*) is a [Roman Catholic](/wiki/Roman_Catholicism "Roman Catholicism") church located in [Sumvitg](/wiki/Sumvitg "Sumvitg"), [Surselva Region](/wiki/Surselva_Region "Surselva Region"), [canton](/wiki/Cantons_of_Switzerland "Cantons of Switzerland") of [Graubünden](/wiki/Graub%C3%BCnden "Graubünden"), [Switzerland](/wiki/Switzerland "Switzerland").

After a 1984 [avalanche](/wiki/Avalanche "Avalanche") destroyed a [Baroque](/wiki/Baroque "Baroque") chapel on the same site, the Disentis Abbey decided to build a new chapel. Architect [Peter Zumthor](/wiki/Peter_Zumthor "Peter Zumthor") won the architectural competition for the project. The new chapel was built between 1985 and 1989 for a total cost of [CHF](/wiki/Swiss_franc "Swiss franc") 600,000.[[1]](#cite_note-baukultur-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) [Jürg Buchli](/w/index.php?title=J%C3%BCrg_Buchli&action=edit&redlink=1 "Jürg Buchli (page does not exist)") and [Jürg Conzett](/wiki/J%C3%BCrg_Conzett "Jürg Conzett") were the engineers.

## Awards

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=St_Benedict%27s_Chapel,_Sumvitg&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Awards")]

* 1992: *Neues Bauen in den Alpen*
* 1994: **Auszeichnungen für gute Bauten Graubünden**
